title: RFE: Enable sync2jira to sync GitHub Issues to Red Hat Jira
body:
I would like to propose enabling a synchronization mechanism between the Podman GitHub repository issues and the Red Hat Jira instance using sync2jira.

Since Red Hat’s Jira is open and accessible to community members outside of Red Hat, this sync would not create a barrier for external contributors.

GitHub issues to automatically create the corresponding Jira tickets. Status updates or comments to sync using a webhook.

This applies to other projects inside the org including but not limited to Podman, Skopeo, buildah, container-libs and others.
